targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(AVG(savings), 2) as value FROM (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as m, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) as savings FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-6 months') AND tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY m)
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(AVG(savings), 2) as value FROM (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as m, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) as savings FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-6 months') AND tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY m)

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(AVG(savings) * 6, 2) as value FROM (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as m, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) as savings FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-6 months') AND tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY m)
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(AVG(savings) * 6, 2) as value FROM (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as m, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) as savings FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-6 months') AND tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY m)

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(AVG(savings) * 12, 2) as value FROM (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as m, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) as savings FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-12 months') AND tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY m)
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(AVG(savings) * 12, 2) as value FROM (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as m, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) as savings FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-12 months') AND tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY m)

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', substr(date,1,7) || '-07') AS INTEGER) as time, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END), 2) as savings FROM transactions WHERE tx_type IN ('income','expense') AND date >= date('now', '-12 months') GROUP BY substr(date,1,7) ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', substr(date,1,7) || '-07') AS INTEGER) as time, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END), 2) as savings FROM transactions WHERE tx_type IN ('income','expense') AND date >= date('now', '-12 months') GROUP BY substr(date,1,7) ORDER BY time

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', substr(date,1,7) || '-07') AS INTEGER) as time, ROUND(CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN (SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN ABS(COALESCE(amount_base,amount)) ELSE 0 END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) * 100 ELSE 0 END, 1) as savings_rate FROM transactions WHERE tx_type IN ('income','expense') AND date >= date('now', '-12 months') GROUP BY substr(date,1,7) ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', substr(date,1,7) || '-07') AS INTEGER) as time, ROUND(CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN (SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN ABS(COALESCE(amount_base,amount)) ELSE 0 END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) * 100 ELSE 0 END, 1) as savings_rate FROM transactions WHERE tx_type IN ('income','expense') AND date >= date('now', '-12 months') GROUP BY substr(date,1,7) ORDER BY time

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', substr(date,1,7) || '-07') AS INTEGER) as time, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END), 2) as income, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN ABS(COALESCE(amount_base,amount)) ELSE 0 END), 2) as expenses FROM transactions WHERE tx_type IN ('income','expense') AND date >= date('now', '-12 months') GROUP BY substr(date,1,7) ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', substr(date,1,7) || '-07') AS INTEGER) as time, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END), 2) as income, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN ABS(COALESCE(amount_base,amount)) ELSE 0 END), 2) as expenses FROM transactions WHERE tx_type IN ('income','expense') AND date >= date('now', '-12 months') GROUP BY substr(date,1,7) ORDER BY time

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT time, SUM(savings) OVER (ORDER BY time) as cumulative_savings FROM (SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', substr(date,1,7) || '-07') AS INTEGER) as time, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END), 2) as savings FROM transactions WHERE tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY substr(date,1,7)) ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT time, SUM(savings) OVER (ORDER BY time) as cumulative_savings FROM (SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', substr(date,1,7) || '-07') AS INTEGER) as time, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END), 2) as savings FROM transactions WHERE tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY substr(date,1,7)) ORDER BY time

targets.rawQueryText: WITH avg_savings AS (SELECT AVG(savings) as avg_save FROM (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as m, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) as savings FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-6 months') AND tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY m)), months(n) AS (SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT n+1 FROM months WHERE n < 12) SELECT 'Month +' || m.n as period, ROUND(m.n * a.avg_save, 0) as projected_savings, ROUND(a.avg_save, 0) as monthly_rate FROM months m, avg_savings a
targets.queryText: WITH avg_savings AS (SELECT AVG(savings) as avg_save FROM (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as m, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) as savings FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-6 months') AND tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY m)), months(n) AS (SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT n+1 FROM months WHERE n < 12) SELECT 'Month +' || m.n as period, ROUND(m.n * a.avg_save, 0) as projected_savings, ROUND(a.avg_save, 0) as monthly_rate FROM months m, avg_savings a

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT substr(date,1,7) as m FROM transactions ORDER BY m DESC
list.label: Cycle
list.name: cycle
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT substr(date,1,7) as m FROM transactions ORDER BY m DESC
